title: 7 Stocks Sitting At 52-Week Highs Right Now
text: Propelled by strong earnings and upbeat guidance, the shares of several leading companies are now at their highest level in a year. And while some investors might be weary of stocks trading at 52-week highs, assuming they are destined to fall, many of the securities involved are from best-of-breed companies and household names.

title: Intuit CFO Sandeep Aujla to Present at Goldman Sachs Conference
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), the global financial technology platform that makes TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, announced today that Sandeep Aujla, chief financial officer of Intuit, will present at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference on September 6, 2023. The fireside chat will begin at 3:45 p.m. Pacific Time (6:45 p.m. Eastern Time) and will be available live via audio webcast on Intuit's investor relations website.

title: Intuit Executive Mark Notarainni to Present at Citi Global Technology Conference
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), the global financial technology platform that makes TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, announced today that Mark Notarainni, executive vice president and general manager of Intuit's consumer group, will present at the Citi Global Technology Conference on September 6, 2023. The fireside chat will begin at 12:15 p.m. Pacific Time (3:15 p.m. Eastern Time) and will be available live via audio webcast on Intuit's inv.

title: Intuit analysts up target price as risk/reward looks ‘favorable'
text: Bank of America Securities analysts continue to see favorable risk/reward for shares of Intuit Inc going forward as they viewed the financial software company's fourth-quarter financial results as being generally “healthy” although its full-year 2024 guidance was “mixed”.   In a note to clients, they raised their price objective on Intuit to $580 per share from $530, while reiterating their ‘Buy' rating, “to reflect the better small business outlook and potential for upside to derisked consumer tax outlook from here”.

title: Intuit (INTU) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Intuit (INTU) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.65 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.38 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.10 per share a year ago.

title: The Afterhours: Intuit, Gap, Nordstrom
text: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) shares fell 1.7% after the bell Thursday after the company issued underwhelming revenue guidance.  The company posted revenue of $2.71 billion, up 12% year-over-year, and adjusted earnings of $1.66 per share for its fiscal fourth quarter.

title: Intuit beats fiscal 4Q expectations but shares fall on lackluster guidance
text: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) shares fell after the bell Thursday after the company issued underwhelming revenue guidance.  The company posted revenue of $2.71 billion, up 12% year-over-year, and adjusted earnings of $1.66 per share for its fiscal fourth quarter.

title: Intuit's stock is down slightly despite a revenue and earnings beat
text: Intuit Inc.'s stock initially dipped 3% in extended trading Thursday after the software company reported quarterly results that topped analyst estimates but issued tepid revenue guidance for its current quarter.

title: Our Top 10 Picks For Dividend Growth Stocks - August 2023
text: This monthly series of articles focuses on DGI stocks that are likely to provide a high rate of dividend growth rather than a high current yield. We use our proprietary models to rate quantitatively and qualitatively and select the top ten names from an initial list of nearly 400 dividend stocks. The article provides criteria for selecting high-growth dividend stocks and offers a step-by-step guide on how to structure a portfolio based on this strategy.

title: PayPal taps Intuit executive as next CEO
text: PayPal's next CEO will be longtime senior Intuit executive Alex Chriss. Chriss will take over next month, replacing former CEO Dan Schulman who led the company since 2014.

title: PayPal Taps Intuit's Alex Chriss as New CEO
text: PayPal shares rose in early trading on Monday after it tapped Intuit's Alex Chriss as its new CEO.

title: New PayPal CEO Named, Intuit Executive To Run E-Commerce Firm
text: E-commerce firm PayPal has chosen an Intuit official to become its new chief executive. PYPL stock edged up on the news Monday.

title: PayPal taps Intuit's Alex Chriss as its next CEO
text: PayPal Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:PYPL) shares are trading higher Monday after the company announced that Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) executive Alex Chriss will serve as the company's next CEO.  Chriss has been with Intuit for almost 20 years, most recently as the general manager of its small-business and self-employed group.

title: PayPal Picks Intuit Executive as CEO. He Needs to Stop a Stock Slump.
text: Alex Chriss will succeed Dan Schulman as chief executive effective Sept. 27, the company said.

title: PayPal names Intuit veteran Alex Chriss its next CEO
text: Intuit Inc. executive Alex Chriss will serve as the next leader of PayPal Holdings Inc., the digital payments giant said Monday.

title: Intuit Names Marianna Tessel General Manager of Small Business and Self-Employed Group
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), the global financial technology platform that makes Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, named Marianna Tessel General Manager of its Small Business and Self-Employed Group, Intuit's largest and fastest growing business. Effective September 5, 2023, Tessel will be stepping into the position previously held by Alex Chriss, who has been named the new CEO of PayPal. Intuit also announced that Alex Balazs will.

title: Intuit: Aftermath Of The Acquisition Spree (Rating Downgrade)
text: Intuit has strong performance in Q2 and Q3 of FY 2023, riding on the recovery of small business demand, about 9% exceeded its previous guidance. The company's recent acquisition has led to large goodwill-to-asset ratio, high debt-to-EBITDA and its cash reserve is weak compared to its recent borrowing need. The company will have upcoming margin compression that take away the operational performance.
